title: Mission to Dantooine
content:
{{Top|leg}} {{Otheruses|Battle of Dantooine}} {{Conjecture|legends}} {{Battle |prev=[[Attack on Yavin 4]]''[[Star Wars: Rogue Squadron III: Rebel Strike]]'' |conc=[[Yavin blockade]] |next=[[Defense of Ralltiir]] |image=[[File:Dantooine01.jpg]] |name=Mission to Dantooine |conflict=[[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]] |date=[[0 ABY/Legends|0 ABY]] |place=[[Dantooine/Legends|Dantooine]] |result=Successful defection and rescue of [[Tycho Celchu/Legends|Tycho Celchu]] |side1=[[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Alliance to Restore the Republic]] |side2=[[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] |side3= |side4= |commanders1=[[Commander/Legends|Commander]] [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]] |commanders2= |commanders3= |commanders4= |unit1= |unit2= |unit3= |unit4= |forces1=*[[Red Squadron (Rebel Alliance)/Legends|Red Squadron]] **Luke Skywalker **[[Sarkli]] **Tycho Celchu *[[74-Z speeder bike/Legends|74-Z speeder bikes]] *3 [[T-65 X-wing starfighter/Legends|T-65 X-wing starfighters]] *3 [[BTL Y-wing starfighter/Legends|BTL Y-wing starfighters]] *1 [[TIE/IN interceptor/Legends|TIE/IN interceptor]]† |forces2=*[[Storm commando/Legends|Storm commandos]] *7 [[Armored Personnel Carrier]]s *5 [[Imperial Action transport]]s *[[Stormtrooper/Legends|Stormtroopers]] *[[Scout trooper/Legends|Scout troopers]] *[[74-Z speeder bike/Legends|74-Z speeder bikes]] *39 [[TIE/sa tactical bomber/Legends|TIE/sa bombers]] *24 [[Viper probe droid/Legends|Viper probe droids]] *At least 5 [[E-Web heavy repeating blaster/Legends|E-Web heavy repeating blasters]] |forces3= |forces4= |casual1=*Several members of the strike team and their starfighters *The TIE/IN interceptor |casual2=*1 Armored Personal Carrier disabled *Moderate loss of infantry and probe droids |casual3= |casual4= |civilian= }} {{Quote|My readings show a heavy concentration of Imperial forces in the area.''"
"''This is bad. There shouldn't be any Imperial forces here.|Sarkli and another pilot|}} The [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance's]] [[Red Squadron (Rebel Alliance)/Legends|Red Squadron]] conducted a '''mission''' to [[Dantooine/Legends|Dantooine]]. The squadron skirmished with the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] over a defecting [[Officer/Legends|officer]] named [[Tycho Celchu/Legends|Tycho Celchu]], who had secretly contacted the Rebel Alliance regarding his planned defection, though this was quickly discovered by his superiors and he was arrested at his extraction site. ==Prelude== After the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]]''[[Star Wars: X-Wing Rogue Squadron]]'' obliterated his [[Homeworld/Legends|home planet]] of [[Alderaan/Legends|Alderaan]], in [[0 BBY/Legends|0 BBY]],''[[The New Essential Chronology]]'' TIE pilot [[Tycho Celchu/Legends|Tycho Celchu]] became disillusioned with his career and decided to jump ship. A [[0 ABY/Legends|few months later]], he contacted the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] and agreed to meet on [[Dantooine/Legends|Dantooine]] to defect. ==The mission== ===The rescue mission=== {{Quote|You got here just in time. We've got to get out of here.|Celchu to Skywalker|}} The Rebels sent [[Red Squadron (Rebel Alliance)/Legends|Red Squadron]], led by [[Commander/Legends|Commander]] [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]], to Dantooine to meet up with Tycho Celchu and extract him. Six starfighters—three [[T-65B X-wing starfighter/Legends|T-65B X-wing starfighters]] and three [[BTL Y-wing starfighter/Legends|BTL Y-wing starfighters]], went on the mission. Upon exit from [[Hyperspace/Legends|hyperspace]] at Dantooine, [[Sarkli]] alerted the squadron that a large concentration of Imperial forces was in the area. Tycho Celchu then contacted Red Squadron, desperately telling them to abort the mission, as his defection had been discovered by the Imperials. His [[TIE/IN interceptor/Legends|TIE interceptor]] was shot down by the time he attempted to warn them. Skywalker told his squadron they needed to get him out of there. Thus, Red Squadron revised its extraction mission into a rescue mission. The strike team landed on the planet, with Skywalker and Sarkli proceeding on foot and ambushing two [[Scout trooper/Legends|scout troopers]] nearby. Sarkli took them out by causing a rockslide with his blaster, and squadron leader Luke Skywalker congratulated Sarkli before going off on his own on a [[74-Z speeder bike/Legends|74-Z speeder bike]]. Sarkli wanted to come with him, but Skywalker convinced him to guard the landing zone with the rest of the team while updating Skywalker via [[Comlink/Legends|comlink]]. When he reached the destination, [[Stormtrooper/Legends|stormtroopers]] and [[Storm commando/Legends|storm commandos]]—threatening that any secrets that Celchu managed to uncover while spying for the Rebels would die with him—had already loaded Celchu onto an [[Armored Personnel Carrier|APC]] destined for one of the landed [[Imperial Action transport|Imperial transports]]. Skywalker dismounted and ran towards an [[E-Web heavy repeating blaster/Legends|E-web emplacement]]. Skywalker took control of several more E-webs as the APC moved out of their fields of fire. Heavy blaster fire from the cannons disabled the vehicle and allowed Celchu to escape. ===The escape=== Celchu grabbed another speeder bike, and the two pilots raced toward the other side of the canyon, with Celchu guiding the way. [[TIE/sa tactical bomber/Legends|TIE/sa bombers]] bombarded the route, killing several strike team members, and Sarkli reported that they were under attack. {{Gamemechanics|Star Wars: Rogue Squadron III: Rebel Strike}} Upon reaching a fork in the path just as the bombardment was starting, Skywalker took the left fork in order to retrieve some advanced lasers/blasters. {{Endgame}} Skywalker and Celchu had to avoid more Imperials and the bombers, jumping their bikes over a chasm. During their escape, Sarkli contacted them, telling them that they were under attack and to hurry out of there. When they arrived at the encampment, they discovered the only survivor was Sarkli. The pilots left the planet in the three remaining X-wings and returned to the Rebellion. When Skywalker asked who was trying to arrest Celchu, Celchu explained that they were storm commandos, elite soldiers tasked with acquiring weapons for the Empire, and reported that he had information regarding a plan to capture [[Scientist/Legends|scientists]]. ==Aftermath== {{Quote|Master, one of our officers has defected to the Rebellion. It is believed that he has supplied them with valuable information.''"
"''It is of no consequence. Our forces have already blockaded the planet Ralltiir.|Darth Vader and Emperor Palpatine|}} Celchu supplied the Alliance with intelligence that several scientists on the planet [[Ralltiir/Legends|Ralltiir]] wished to defect to the Alliance, but had been discovered. They were trapped in the main city, protected by only a [[Force field/Legends|force field]]. Celchu requested that the squadron help extract them before the Imperials got to them. Luke commented that he knew of a pilot who could rescue the researchers in time after deciding that they should alert the Alliance to send a rescue team to Ralltiir. In that same battle, another defection occurred: Rebel lieutenant Sarkli defected to the Empire. [[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Darth Vader]] reported to [[Galactic Emperor/Legends|Emperor]] [[Palpatine/Legends|Palpatine]] about Celchu's defection, but Palpatine believed that whatever information he gave to the Rebel Alliance about their plan to capture scientists on Ralltiir was of no consequence, as they already blockaded the planet. Celchu later became a successful member of the Rebel Alliance, flying for the successor to Red Squadron, [[Rogue Squadron/Legends|Rogue Squadron]]. ==Behind the scenes== {{Quote|Rendezvous with the Imperial defector Tycho on Dantooine, and deliver him safely to the Rebels.|Mission briefing for "Defiance on Dantooine"|}} This article is based on a mission in the [[2003]] [[Star Wars video games|video game]] ''[[Star Wars: Rogue Squadron III: Rebel Strike]]''. The mission illustrates how Tycho Celchu became a member of the Rebel Alliance, albeit in a more dramatic fashion than had previously been alluded to. Chris Kroffer designed the level. His design kept new players to the series in mind, and he chose to make speeder bikes significant in the mission because they were the fastest ground-based craft, and likewise were popular with players. ==Appearances== *''[[Star Wars: Rogue Squadron III: Rebel Strike]]'' {{1st}} ==Sources== *''[[Star Wars: Rogue Squadron III: Rebel Strike: The Official Nintendo Player's Guide]]'' ==Notes and references== {{Reflist}} {{GCW Blockade}} {{Interlang |da=Missionen på Dantooine |de=Scharmützel von Dantooine |es=Misión a Dantooine }} {{DEFAULTSORT:Dantooine, mission to}} [[Category:Battles of Dantooine]] [[Category:Missions of the Galactic Civil War]] [[Category:Rescue missions]]
